issue.title: WPHX-313.09 — Close bounded media/filesystem/upload domain evidence

command: domain closure audit over WPHX-313.01 through WPHX-313.08 receipts
artifact_scope: mixed: source_inventory, adapter_contract, oracle_source_mirror, packaged_distribution, declared_upstream_suite_scope

artifacts.role: media, image, filesystem, upload source, distribution, ABI, and upstream test surface inventory
typed Haxe media upload adapter-contract evidence
deterministic upload validation, MIME, unique filename, upload-dir, and sideload oracle-source-mirror evidence
deterministic image editor selection, metadata, subsize, and displayability oracle-source-mirror evidence
deterministic filesystem method, credentials, bootstrap, and direct filesystem IO oracle-source-mirror evidence
selected upstream media/image/upload/filesystem/REST/AJAX PHPUnit ratchet group scope with deterministic blocked status
packaged installed-style media/upload HTTP gate evidence

fixtures_cover: media, image, filesystem, upload source/distribution/ABI/upstream surface inventory
media upload validation, MIME/filetype routing, unique filename routing, attachment metadata handoff, filesystem backend/credential routing, and media hook intent
upload validation, sideload, upload directory, MIME, filetype, filename collision, and pre-move observations
image editor selection, output format, resize dimensions, intermediate sizes, missing subsizes, metadata generation/update, and displayability observations
filesystem method selection, credential filtering/form handling, direct filesystem bootstrap, missing transport handling, and direct local filesystem IO observations
image/filesystem adapter decisions across editor selection, metadata/subsize update intent, filesystem credential/method routing, and direct IO intent
selected upstream media, image editor/metadata, upload/MIME/filesystem, REST attachment, and AJAX media PHPUnit ratchet scope

packaged installed-style package boundary, upload validation/unique filename, attachment response, image metadata/editor/subsize, REST attachment upload, AJAX image edit, and direct filesystem credential/IO observations
remaining_gaps: Generated public PHP replacement for media.php, post.php attachment helpers, file.php, class-wp-image-editor.php, image editor subclasses, filesystem classes, REST attachment controllers, AJAX media handlers, and related original-path files is not claimed.
Complete upstream media PHPUnit pass/pass parity is not claimed; the selected WPHX-313 ratchet groups are declared but currently blocked on local PHPUnit runtime inputs.
Real native image-library behavior for GD, Imagick, AVIF, HEIC, PDF previews, EXIF/IPTC extraction, actual subsize generation, and filesystem image writes remains later work.
Remote filesystem transport parity for FTP extension, FTP sockets, SSH2, path mapping, credential prompting, updater integration, and error handling is not claimed.

Database-backed installed media persistence, attachment metadata persistence, admin media screens, REST/AJAX media flows, multisite quotas/paths, and updater/installer orchestration remain later distribution work.
Copied upstream PHP and deterministic routers remain bridge evidence where noted; durable original-path public adapter ownership requires WPHX PHP Adapter IR or backend/custom-target evidence.
This closes the bounded WPHX-313 source-domain evidence slice, not the whole WordPress media subsystem.
